events.event_description: Richard Clough Anderson presented credentials as Minister Plenipotentiary to Gran Colombia, establishing the first U.S. legation.

evidence.quote: Richard Clough Anderson, Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1823-01-27. Credentials presented: 1823-12-16. Died at Cartagena 1826-07-24. Note: Commissioned to Colombia (i.e. "Gran Colombia," which separated into the states of Ecuador, New Granada, and Venezuela).

events.event_description: Spruille Braden presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission from a legation to an embassy.

evidence.quote: Spruille Braden, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1939-01-20. Credentials presented: 1939-02-15. Left Colombia 1942-03-12.
